news.headline: SMArtX adds 8 new strategies from 2 asset firms. Total now 1,531 strategies from 322 firms on the platform.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, SMArtX Advisory Solutions, a prominent figure in managed accounts technology, has revealed the inclusion of 8 fresh strategies from two renowned asset management firms into its Manager Marketplace. This move further solidifies SMArtX's extensive platform, which currently showcases a total of 1,531 strategies from 322 distinguished asset management firms. Notably, Oak Associates has introduced large cap growth, small cap growth, and technology strategies to their offerings on the platform, contributing to its diverse range of investment options. Victoria Capital Mana also made a significant addition, although specific details were not provided in the information presented.

news.headline: HACR launches 2025 Corporate Inclusion Index survey to drive Hispanic inclusion in corporate America. Survey open until March 5.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Washington, the Hispanic Association on Corporate Responsibility (HACR) has introduced the 2025 edition of its annual Corporate Inclusion Index™ (CII) survey. The survey will be available for responses until March 5, 2025. The CII survey is a key initiative by HACR aimed at evaluating and promoting corporate inclusion.

news.headline: Are Roth IRAs truly superior? That's debatable.
Therap Connect unveils new features to improve sleep tracking and user activity monitoring in the human services sector.
news.summary: In Torrington, Connecticut on January 9, 2025, Therap Services announced their position as a leading provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for organizations in the Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and other human services sectors. Their services cater to numerous organizations nationwide.

news.headline: Offchain Labs appoints Ira Auerbach to lead 'Tandem' division, accelerating partner studio; News from Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: In a recent update, Offchain Labs, the group of original core developers for Arbitrum and Ethereum consensus client Prysm, revealed the selection of Ira to lead Tandem, their partner studio and venture capital division. This move aims to enhance Tandem's growth and bolster its position in the market. The appointment, made on January 9, 2025, signifies a strategic milestone for Offchain Labs as they aim to capitalize on Ira's expertise and experience to drive their initiatives forward. This decision underlines Offchain Labs' commitment to innovation and expanding their presence in the industry.

news.headline: Securus piloting tablets for prisons, shows success in customer pilot programs at ACA Winter Conference, EVOTAB & Officer T80.
news.summary: In Dallas on January 9, 2025, Securus Technologies, a top corrections technology provider, shared positive outcomes from initial customer trials of their EVOTAB and Officer T80 tablets at the American Correctional Association (ACA) Winter Conference. The tablets are being tested in pilot programs and have shown promising results, showcasing the company's innovation and commitment to advancing technology in the corrections sector.

news.headline: BLUETTI reveals Apex 300 and EnergyPro 6K at CES 2025. Technology pioneer in clean energy. CES Innovation Award honoree.
news.summary: Presenting itself as a pioneer in clean energy technology, BLUETTI showcased its innovative energy solutions at CES 2025 in Las Vegas on January 9, 2025. This leading clean energy solutions provider and recipient of the CES Innovation Award introduced its newest energy storage solutions at the event.

news.headline: Alliant Credit Union Foundation awards a record $1.6 million to bridge the digital divide in Illinois and Nationwide in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, a foundation granted more than $1.6 million to community organizations in Illinois and across the country, concentrating on digital equity. This funding aims to enhance access to dependable broadband services, digital literacy materials, and technology devices for marginalized communities. The initiative, announced on January 9, 2025, in Chicago, reflects a commitment to narrowing the digital divide and promoting equal opportunities for all.

news.headline: Firehouse Subs® to open 500+ restaurants in Brazil by 2025, starting with ambitious expansion plans.
news.summary: Popular sandwich chain Firehouse Subs® will be expanding its presence in Brazil by opening over 500 restaurants within the next decade, starting in 2025. This move marks the brand's strategic international expansion efforts. The announcement was made in Toronto on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Old World Labs reveals cutting-edge AI agents at CES 2025, enhancing robotics and virtual worlds. #OWL #CES2025
news.summary: At the start of CES 2025 in Las Vegas, Old World Labs (OWL) unveiled remarkable progress in its "Agents as a Service" technology. Presenting advanced AI systems, OWL demonstrated their seamless incorporation into humanoid robots and virtual environments.

news.headline: IGM Biosciences updates on Autoimmunity Pipeline Programs with significant developments and advancements.
news.summary: The recent data indicates that the global population has reached over 7.8 billion people, with nearly 4.5 billion having access to the internet. Around 3.8 billion individuals are active social media users, highlighting the significant impact and reach of online platforms. Additionally, over 5.2 billion people worldwide own mobile devices, further emphasizing the widespread use of technology in today's society. These figures reflect the increasing interconnectedness and digitalization of the world, showcasing the importance of online presence and mobile communication in the modern era.

news.headline: Teledyne HiRel Semiconductors released a new high-power RF switch covering 30 MHz to 5 GHz, model TDSW84230EP. #technology
news.summary: Teledyne HiRel Semiconductors, based in Milpitas, California, has introduced their new high-power RF switch, the TDSW84230EP, utilizing Gallium Nitride (GaN) technology. This model is designed to replace traditional PIN diode-based RF switches in tactical and military communication radio systems. The switch, developed with GaN HEMT process, provides high peak power capabilities, catering to the needs of modern RF front ends. This advanced technology switch aims to enhance performance and efficiency within communication systems.

news.headline: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) Q4 earnings expected at $1.76 EPS, $14.21B revenues. Stock up 45.13% past year, 30.99% past 6 months. Wall Street bullish on Delta. BoFA predicts 10% EPS growth by 2025.
news.summary: Delta Air Lines Inc (NYSE:DAL) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Friday, with Wall Street anticipating $1.76 in EPS and $14.21 billion in revenues. The stock has seen a notable 45.13% increase in the last year and a 30.99% rise over the past six months. Analysts at BoFA forecast a 10% EPS growth for Delta by 2025 and are optimistic about a robust Q4 performance. The stock's current trajectory seems strongly bullish ahead of the earnings report. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley to release Q4 earnings with analysts predicting $1.67 per share, revenue of $14.99 billion. Shares closed at $127.86, up 0.8%.
news.summary: Financial institution Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) is set to disclose its fourth-quarter earnings figures on Thursday, Jan. 16, 2025, prior to the market opening. Analysts anticipate the firm, headquartered in New York, to post quarterly earnings of $1.67 per share, a notable increase from the 85 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the recent quarter is expected to be approximately $14.99 billion, up from $12.9 billion recorded in the previous year. The Securities and Exchange Commission announced that Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC has agreed to a $15 million penalty to resolve charges of negligence in preventing four financial advisors from embezzling millions in client funds. On Wednesday, Morgan Stanley's shares rose by 0.8% to close at $127.86. For more in-depth details, readers can refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Synovus Financial (NYSE: SNV) to report Q4 earnings on Jan 15, estimated at $1.22 per share with $19.43 billion revenue. Stock upgraded, now offering 2.90% annual dividend yield.
news.summary: Synovus Financial Corp. (NYSE: SNV) is set to announce its Q4 financial performance on Wednesday, Jan. 15, 2025, after market close. Analysts predict earnings of $1.22 per share, a significant increase from last year's 84 cents per share. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be $19.43 billion, up from $17.44 billion in the previous year. Barclays recently upgraded the stock rating to Overweight, with a raised price target of $95, as compared to the previous $70. Alongside the stock value, investors are also looking at the annual dividend yield of 2.90% offered by Synovus Financial, with a quarterly dividend of 38 cents per share.

news.headline: US services sector shows strong resilience with December's Services PMI reaching 54.1%, beating economist forecasts. Economic expansion continues for six months. Employment growth remains a concern.
news.summary: The U.S. services sector shows resilience with a stronger-than-expected December Purchasing Managers’ Index (PMI) reading of 54.1%, surpassing economist forecasts of 53.3%. This marks a significant increase from November's 52.1% and represents the sector's third-highest level of the year. The sector has seen six consecutive months of expansion, with 22 out of the last 24 months experiencing growth dating back to January 2023. Key drivers of this growth include increased business activity and supplier deliveries, with the ISM Business Activity Index rising to 58.2 in December from 53.7 in November. New orders also saw a positive trend, climbing to 54.2. However, rising price pressures and tariff concerns are casting shadows over the optimistic economic outlook.

news.headline: Wall Street predicts Concentrix will report Q4 earnings of $3.01/share and revenue of $2.44 billion, lower than the year prior. Shares closed at $45.60.
news.summary: Concentrix Corporation (NYSE:CNXC) is scheduled to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on Wednesday, Jan. 15, after the market closes. Analysts are predicting quarterly earnings of $3.01 per share, a decrease from $3.36 per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $2.44 billion, up from $2.23 billion in the previous year. In its last quarterly report on Sept. 25, Concentrix posted earnings of $2.87 per share, falling short of the expected $2.93 per share. Following this news, Concentrix shares closed at $45.60 on Wednesday, dropping by 0.4%. For more details and analyst ratings, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Investor rights firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates 4 companies including Marinus Pharmaceuticals for securities law violations.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, a law firm named Halper Sadeh LLC announced that they are conducting an investigation into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties. One of the companies under investigation is Marinus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange. The investigation aims to determine if there were any violations harming the shareholders' interests. The specific details of the allegations and potential consequences remain undisclosed at this time.

news.headline: Vagaro’s 2025 report reveals industry trends based on research with thousands of businesses and consumers.
news.summary: A recent report by Vagaro, a top software provider for beauty, fitness, and wellness industries, has unveiled the 2025 Vantage Report. Based on extensive research involving numerous business owners and consumers, the report focuses on key trends and strategies for success in 2025. It delves into the most sought-after services in 2024, emerging consumer preferences, and practical insights for business growth. The report encompasses a range of data points, including the most in-demand service appointments and recommended strategies to embrace seasonal trends.

news.headline: Cold Stone Creamery offers festive chocolate treats for New Year & Valentine's Day; includes Fudge Truffle Ice Cream.Characters: 128
news.summary: Celebrate this New Year and Valentine's Day with indulgent chocolate treats from Cold Stone Creamery®! The renowned ice cream shop in Scottsdale, Arizona, is offering a range of delectable options including their signature Fudge Truffle Ice Cream and Falling in Chocolate™ dessert. Don't miss out on these sweet offerings to make your celebrations extra special. Visit Cold Stone Creamery's website at www.ColdStoneCreamery.com for more information.

news.headline: Nvidia, Google, and OpenAI use 'synthetic data' factories to train AI models due to high demand for data.
news.summary: Three prominent tech companies, Nvidia, Google, and OpenAI, are embracing the use of "synthetic data" factories to meet the increasing need for extensive datasets crucial for training artificial intelligence models. This shift comes as demand for vast amounts of data continues to rise in the AI sector. The companies are utilizing these synthetic data factories to enhance their AI model training processes. This development highlights a trend towards leveraging artificial data generation methods to support the advancement of AI technology.

news.headline: Nuclear stocks surged in 2024 due to AI wave. Uncertainty looms for 2025. Buy or sell?
news.summary: Last year, nuclear stocks experienced a surge in value, attributed to advancements in artificial intelligence technology. Looking ahead to 2025, investors are now questioning whether these stocks are still a viable investment option. The future trajectory of nuclear stocks remains uncertain as market conditions and technological developments continue to evolve. As we approach 2025, investors are deliberating on whether to buy or sell these stocks based on the dynamic landscape of the industry.

Verses AI Inc. completes $20M prospectus supplement offering.
news.summary: In the latest update, the unemployment rate in the country decreased to 4.5%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from last month. A total of 210,000 jobs were added to the economy, exceeding predictions by economists. The current inflation rate stands at 2.1%, slightly higher than the previous quarter. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was revised to 3.2%, indicating a strong and stable economy. Stocks also saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 2.5% in trading today. Overall, the economic indicators point towards a positive outlook for the country's financial landscape.

news.headline: Historic launch on 15 Jan at 01:11 AM UTC-5 from Kennedy Space Center sends Swedish MoonHouse to the moon.
news.summary: A groundbreaking event is set to take place on 15 January in Stockholm. At precisely 01:11 AM (UTC-5), the Swedish MoonHouse will embark on an unprecedented journey from the Kennedy Space Center. This historic space launch marks a significant moment for Sweden, as it ventures into uncharted territory.

news.headline: Syte and Tally Weijl team up to enhance apparel eCommerce with AI-driven recommendations. AI boosts conversions and reduces out-of-stocks.
news.summary: Syte, an AI-driven product discovery and recommendation engine, is making significant strides in the apparel industry by enhancing conversions, increasing order values, and minimizing out-of-stock instances for brands. This unique technology, based in New York, is proving to be a game-changer. On January 9, 2025, it was reported that Syte has achieved remarkable success by utilizing its AI capabilities to provide superior product recommendations, ultimately benefiting various apparel brands. This innovation has led to a notable increase in conversions and higher order values, while also effectively reducing instances of out-of-stock products.

news.headline: Complete Genomics expanded US manufacturing in 2024 to increase supply chain reliability and better serve customers.
news.summary: In January 2025, Complete Genomics, a leading genomic sequencing firm based in San Jose, California, announced that they had expanded their U.S. manufacturing operations in 2024. This expansion included integrating advanced technology solutions to enhance their capabilities and diversify their supply chain. This strategic move was aimed at ensuring the continued provision of reliable services to their customers.

news.headline: Thompson in South Carolina receives $2 million grants to establish foster care services, aiming for transformation.
news.summary: A nonprofit organization called Thompson, based in Columbia, South Carolina and with more than 140 years of experience in providing foster care, mental health, and prevention services, has recently received two substantial grants amounting to a total of over $2.2 million. The organization expressed pride in being able to secure this funding to continue their work in transforming lives through their various programs.

news.summary: A former powerhouse is currently struggling to rejuvenate a buyout by Nippon Steel. Potential partnerships might encounter difficulties as well, and pursuing independent operations could result in necessary reductions.

news.headline: Verizon recognized as a Leader by Gartner in Private Mobile Network Services, with top scores for Vision & Execution.
news.summary: Verizon has been recognized as a Leader by a report for its strong performance in both "Completeness of Vision" and "Ability to Execute." This achievement makes Verizon the sole U.S.-based service provider to receive this honor, showcasing its outstanding performance in the industry.

news.headline: Richmond American Homes to open new Riverside County community in Menifee on Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Menifee, California, the highly anticipated debut of Riverwalk Village at Town Center is set for this Saturday, January 9, 2025. Richmond American Homes of Maryland, Inc., a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc., is excited to announce the Grand Opening. This new development promises to bring a fresh perspective to the area's real estate market.

news.headline: Global Ruthenium market valued at $5.1 billion in 2023; projected to reach $7.1 billion by 2030, growing at 4.8% CAGR.
news.summary: Dublin – A new report, "Ruthenium - Global Strategic Business Report," is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global Ruthenium market reached an estimated value of US$5.1 Billion in 2023 and is anticipated to hit US$7.1 Billion by 2030, indicating a steady CAGR of 4.8% between 2023 and 2030. This detailed study offers insights into market trends, driving factors, and projections to assist businesses in making informed decisions. Ruthenium, a lesser-known member of the platinum group, is the focus of this report.

news.headline: Construction groups ask Trump to end anti-competitive rules to save $10B yearly on federal projects above $35M.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, a coalition of twenty-four construction and business organizations, including Associated Builders and Contractors, issued a letter to President-elect Donald Trump requesting the removal of President Joe Biden's rule enforcing Executive Order 14063. This rule mandates that federal construction contracts exceeding $35 million must adhere to anti-competitive and inflationary project labor agreements. The group also urged for the reversal of other Biden administration directives promoting PLA requirements on privately-funded construction projects and those supported by local and state governments. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Intermountain Primary Children's Hospital joins Children's Brain Tumor Network to speed up pediatric research, led by Dr. Samuel Cheshier and Dr. Nicholas Whipple.
news.summary: A recent announcement revealed that Intermountain Primary Children's Hospital has joined the Children's Brain Tumor Network (CBTN) as a new member institution. The CBTN, led by Dr. Samuel Cheshier and Dr. Nicholas Whipple, aims to advance research on pediatric brain tumors. This collaboration brings together experts from various institutions to work towards improving treatment and outcomes for children with brain tumors. The addition of Intermountain Primary Children's Hospital strengthens the network, which now includes a total of [insert number] member institutions dedicated to this cause.

World of Hyatt members can now earn and redeem points at The Venetian Resort Las Vegas, enjoy on-property benefits, and earn credit towards tier status and rewards when booking through Hyatt.
news.summary: Beginning today, World of Hyatt members have the opportunity to accumulate and utilize points at The Venetian Resort Las Vegas for eligible stays booked through Hyatt. They can earn credit towards achieving tier status, Milestone Rewards, and a Brand Explorer Award. Points can also be earned at select dining and shopping establishments when expenses are charged to their rooms. Elite members can access extra on-site perks. This collaboration grants World of Hyatt members greater flexibility in their options.

UN raises 2025 global economic growth forecast to 2.8% from 2.7%.
UN sees global economic growth of 2.9% in 2026.
Saalex Corporation wins GSA OASIS+ Technical & Engineering Domain Contract potentially worth $1 trillion.
news.summary: Saalex Corporation, a key player in engineering, IT, and technical services for aerospace, defense, and federal sectors, recently secured a government-wide contract with a duration of ten years. This contract has the potential to reach close to $1 trillion in value. The announcement was made on January 9, 2025, highlighting the company's significant achievement in securing this expansive and lucrative opportunity for future growth and impact within the industry.

Midearix in Texas introduces Group Purchasing Organization (GPO) focusing on emerging segments.
news.summary: A spend solutions provider, Midearix, based in Grapevine, Texas, unveiled its new group purchasing platform on January 9, 2025. This platform aims to revolutionize collective buying by concentrating on emerging growth segments and "as-a-Service" spend categories. By bridging crucial gaps in the market, the platform offers a unique approach to cost-effective purchasing.

news.headline: SBA expands 504 Loan Program, opening doors to more small businesses for quality capital. #SBA #SmallBusiness #Expansion
news.summary: Growth Corp recently announced notable enhancements to the SBA 504 Loan Program, enabling a larger number of small and medium-sized enterprises to secure high-quality, extended capital. The improvements were disclosed in Springfield, Illinois, on January 9, 2025. This update aims to provide enhanced financial support to businesses in need of long-term funding solutions.

news.headline: British Swim School founder Rita Goldberg passed away, leaving a 40-year legacy in water safety. Jan 7, 2025.
news.summary: A pioneer in water safety and swim instruction, Rita Goldberg, the founder of British Swim School, passed away on January 7, 2025, in Virginia Beach, VA. The British Swim School, a renowned provider of swimming education in North America, expressed profound sorrow at her passing. This loss signifies the culmination of Goldberg's influential work in promoting swim lessons and water safety.
